headline: Insights Into 4th Largest Medicare Advantage Market Using Mark Farrah Associates’ New Comparison Tools
summary: PITTSBURGH, March 16, 2026--MFA presented a comparative analysis of the top MA plans for Arizona’s Maricopa County using new tools found in Medicare Benefits Analyzer™.
